name: The Abandoned Shrine
narrative: You stumble upon a crumbling shrine half-buried in moss. The stone altar still hums with faint energy. Offerings of bone and wildflower line the base. Whatever god once dwelt here, some trace of power remains.

choices.label: Pray
choices.description: Kneel before the altar and offer a moment of reverence.

outcome.description: The shrine's warmth suffuses you. You feel restored.

choices.label: Desecrate
choices.description: Smash the altar and take whatever valuables remain.

outcome.description: Gold spills from the cracked stone — but a dark whisper follows you.

name: The Wandering Merchant
narrative: A cloaked figure emerges from the shadows, cart laden with curious wares. "Trade, friend? Or perhaps you prefer... a different kind of acquisition?" His smile doesn't reach his eyes.

choices.label: Trade
choices.description: Pay 20 gold for a random Uncommon card.

outcome.description: A fair exchange. You pocket a promising card.

choices.label: Rob
choices.description: Take everything. There will be consequences.

outcome.description: You seize the merchant's gold, but his cry echoes through the dungeon. Something heard it.

name: The Cursed Chest
narrative: An ornate chest sits alone in the center of the room, wreathed in a faint violet glow. Ancient warnings are scratched into the stone around it. The lock is already broken.

choices.label: Open it
choices.description: Claim the rare gear inside. The curse will cost you.

outcome.description: Power surges through you — but something vital drains away.

choices.label: Walk away
choices.description: Leave the chest untouched. Better safe than sorry.

outcome.description: You leave the room. Some doors are best left closed.

name: The Wounded Soldier
narrative: A soldier lies against a broken pillar, clutching a wound that still seeps. Her armor bears a sigil you don't recognize. "Help me," she whispers. "I can fight for you... if I survive."

choices.label: Help
choices.description: Lose 5 HP to treat her wounds. She offers you her battle companion.

outcome.description: She presses a card into your hands before limping away. "Use it well."

choices.label: Ignore
choices.description: You have your own battles to fight.

outcome.description: You walk past in silence. The dungeon offers no rewards for mercy you don't give.

name: The Crossroads
narrative: Three paths diverge before you. A faded signpost offers cryptic directions: left toward distant light, right toward the clang of metal, and straight ahead into darkness so thick it swallows sound.

choices.label: Left path
choices.description: Follow the light. Gain knowledge of what lies ahead.

outcome.description: From a vantage point, you spy the layout of the dungeon ahead.

choices.label: Right path
choices.description: Follow the sound. Discover a discarded piece of gear.

outcome.description: Among the wreckage, you find gear that still holds together.

choices.label: Straight ahead
choices.description: Brave the darkness. Skip ahead on the map.

outcome.description: The darkness spits you out further than expected. You've bypassed a section of the dungeon.

name: The Ancient Forge
narrative: Heat still radiates from a stone forge set deep into the wall. Whoever left it burning is long gone, but the coals glow with unnatural life. A hammer and tongs rest beside an anvil, waiting.

choices.label: Forge gear
choices.description: Use the forge to craft a piece of equipment.

outcome.description: Sparks fly as the metal shapes itself beneath your hands. A weapon takes form.

choices.label: Temper yourself
choices.description: Plunge your hand into the coals. Pain grants power.

outcome.description: The fire brands your flesh. You are tougher for it.

name: The Goblin Gambler
narrative: A goblin crouches behind an overturned crate, three cups arranged before him. "Find the coin, double your gold. Lose it, lose it all. Simple game, yes?" His grin reveals far too many teeth.

choices.label: Play the game
choices.description: Wager 15 gold on the shell game.

outcome.description: The goblin's hands are fast, but yours are faster. You snatch the coin — and his pouch.

choices.label: Flip the table
choices.description: You're not here to gamble. Take what you can.

outcome.description: The goblin squeals and flees, leaving behind a few scattered coins and a crude card.

choices.label: Walk away
choices.description: Never trust a goblin's game.

outcome.description: You leave the goblin to his swindle. Sometimes wisdom is its own reward.

name: The Fallen Hero
narrative: A skeleton in rusted armor sits propped against a pillar, a sealed scroll clutched to its chest. The armor is still serviceable, and the scroll pulses faintly with enchantment. You can only carry one.

choices.label: Take the armor
choices.description: Claim the fallen hero's gear.

outcome.description: The armor fits well enough. The dead have no need of protection.

choices.label: Take the scroll
choices.description: Unroll the enchanted scroll and absorb its knowledge.

outcome.description: The scroll dissolves into light as you read it. New techniques flood your mind.

name: The Poisoned Spring
narrative: A natural spring bubbles up from cracked stone, its water shimmering with an iridescent sheen. The liquid could be healing waters tainted by the dungeon's corruption — or something else entirely.

choices.label: Drink deeply
choices.description: Risk the water. It could heal or harm.

outcome.description: The water burns going down, but warmth spreads through your body. You feel revitalized.

choices.label: Bottle it
choices.description: Collect the water for later. Gain gold from selling it.

outcome.description: Merchants pay well for mysterious liquids. No questions asked.

choices.label: Avoid it
choices.description: Nothing good glows like that.

outcome.description: You leave the spring behind. Caution keeps you alive another day.

name: The Mysterious Statue
narrative: A towering statue of a warrior stands at the center of a forgotten chamber. One hand holds a sword aloft; the other extends an open palm. An inscription reads: 'Offer strength, receive wisdom. Offer gold, receive strength.'

choices.label: Offer HP
choices.description: Sacrifice 6 HP to receive a powerful card.

outcome.description: Blood drips from your palm onto the statue's hand. A card materializes in the air before you.

choices.label: Offer gold
choices.description: Place 25 gold in the statue's palm to gain max HP.

outcome.description: The gold vanishes. Warmth floods your body — you feel hardier than before.

choices.label: Leave
choices.description: Statues that ask for things rarely give fair deals.

outcome.description: You turn your back on the statue. Its eyes seem to follow you out.
